Define the world, context, and circumstances for this character's story.
Lorebook entries dynamically inject context memory (locations, magic, history, relationships) directly into the AI's prompt when trigger keywords are mentioned in recent chat messages.

Chat Summary

AI Settings
AI Engine
Perchance Native uses the built-in AI engine that ships with the Perchance platform. No configuration required — just start chatting. Switch providers above to bring your own model.
Local LLM via Cloudflare Tunnel. Since Perchance is served over HTTPS, browsers block direct calls to http://localhost. Tunnel your local server to get an HTTPS URL: run cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:PORT in a terminal, then paste the resulting https://*.trycloudflare.com URL into the Base URL field below.
Custom endpoint
Paste the HTTPS tunnel URL from cloudflared tunnel. No trailing slash. The endpoint must expose /v1/chat/completions.
The model ID your local server reports. In LM Studio, this is the model name shown in the server tab. For Ollama, use the tag (e.g. llama3.2, qwen2.5:7b).
JSON object of extra HTTP headers. Useful for Cloudflare Access tokens or custom auth.
Quick start with LM Studio: 1) Load a model, 2) Start the Local Server (Developer tab), 3) Run cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:1234 in a terminal, 4) Paste the tunnel URL above. CORS is enabled by default in LM Studio.
WebLLM runs a real LLM entirely in your browser using WebGPU. No server, no API key, fully offline after the first download. Requires Chrome/Edge 113+ or another WebGPU-enabled browser.
— Pick a model —
First load downloads model weights. All models are under 20 GB. Cached for subsequent sessions.
A model ID from the MLC prebuilt list.
Not loaded
